Now in beta — free while building

Write once.
Ship everywhere.

The update hub for indie makers. Draft your product update once, then publish to your changelog, X/Twitter, Discord, and newsletter — in one click.

Create your first update See how it works

From draft to everywhere

Write in Markdown

Draft your update with images, GIFs, and rich formatting. No clunky CMS.

One-click publish

Automatically format for X threads, Discord, newsletters, and your changelog.

Embeddable changelog

A beautiful changelog page you can embed on your site — with zero code.
